mapper.select: SELECT id, stage_id, paper, title, prompt_text, exam_year, image_url, image_description, material_text, task, word_count_min, word_count_max, max_score, source, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM essay_prompt WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO essay_prompt (stage_id, paper, title, prompt_text, exam_year, image_url, image_description, material_text, task, word_count_min, word_count_max, max_score, source, is_active) VALUES (#{stageId}, #{paper}, #{title}, #{promptText}, #{examYear}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageDescription}, #{materialText}, #{task}, #{wordCountMin}, #{wordCountMax}, #{maxScore}, #{source}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE essay_prompt SET stage_id = #{stageId}, paper = #{paper}, title = #{title}, prompt_text = #{promptText}, exam_year = #{examYear}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, image_description = #{imageDescription}, material_text = #{materialText}, task = #{task}, word_count_min = #{wordCountMin}, word_count_max = #{wordCountMax}, max_score = #{maxScore}, source = #{source}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE essay_prompt SET is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
